prestazioni: Twin-turbocharged **VG30DETT** (3.0L DOHC 24V) upgraded with **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbos (56 trim, .64 A/R) on **Tial 44mm wastegates** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valves**, paired with **HKS 264°/264° camshafts** and **JUN Type III forged pistons** (9.0:1 compression) for 550whp on **E85 fuel** with **Walbro 450LPH dual-pump setup**

**Nismo 5-speed close-ratio transmission** reinforced with **PPG Stage 3 gearset (2.322 1st, 1.620 2nd, 1.271 3rd)** and **OS Giken Super Lock limited-slip differential** with **Nismo 2-way clutch-type LSD**, mated to **Nismo 4.375 final drive** for optimized acceleration

**BC Racing BR Type-Z coilovers** with **Swift Springs (12kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear)** and **Nismo front strut tower brace**, paired with **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** and **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, diff mounts)** for chassis rigidity and cornering precision
estetica: **Veilside Fortune 99 widebody kit** (Z32-specific, bolt-on fenders with +3.5" front/+4.5" rear) paired with **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (Z32 OEM replacement, vented) and **C-West rear diffuser** (Z32-specific, 3-piece with integrated exhaust cutouts)

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15 (front) / 18x10.5 +25 (rear)** wheels with **Yokohama Advan A052 245/40/18 (front) / 275/35/18 (rear)** tires, shod with **Nismo 5-spoke lug nuts** and **Muteki SR45 14x1.5 wheel studs** for track safety

**JDM-spec Nissan Z32 **Fairlady Z Twin Turbo** rear badge (blacked-out with **3M Matte Black Vinyl**) and **Nismo front lip spoiler (Z32-specific, urethane)** with **LED DRL conversion (Morimoto XB 5500K)** in OEM headlight housings, paired with **GReddy rear fog light delete (JDM-style)**
